sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (haystack String, needle String);
SELECT ngramSearchCaseInsensitiveUTF8(haystack, needle) AS match_score FROM test_strings;
UPDATE test_strings SET needle = 'WORLD' WHERE haystack = 'Hello World';
SELECT ngramSearchCaseInsensitiveUTF8(haystack, needle) AS match_score FROM test_strings WHERE match_score > 0.5;
